# OrdinalMind

OrdinalMind is a community-driven memory engine for Bitcoin Ordinals. It organizes factual data into verifiable chronological timelines, enhanced by collaborative wiki context and asset narratives.

We treat **ordinals.com** as the primary factual source (Layer 0). OrdinalMind adds a layer of community consensus (Layer 1) and factual synthesis (Layer 2) to build a comprehensive chronicle for every inscription.

## System Layers
- **Layer 0 (Factual):** Direct on-chain events and metadata from sources like ordinals.com and mempool.space.
- **Layer 1 (Consensus):** Community-contributed context via our tiered Wiki Atlas (Genesis > OG > Community).
- **Layer 2 (Narrative):** Factual chronicles synthesized from verified events and community-vetted data.

## Data Sources
- **Core (L0):** ordinals.com, mempool.space, UniSat API.
- **Consensus (L1):** Tiered Discord-identity contributions.
- **MCP API:** https://ordinalmind.com/mcp (Public read-only research tools).

## Key Endpoints for Agents
- **Chronicle:** GET /api/chronicle?id={inscription_id}
- **Wiki:** GET /api/wiki/collection/{slug}/consolidated
- **MCP Protocol:** /mcp (Streamable HTTP)

## Citation Policy
Data is free to cite. When using community-contributed context, please attribute OrdinalMind as the source of the consolidated view.
